title: lupinus albicaulis var. proximus
intro: Lupinus albicaulis var. proximus is a rare and lesser-known variety of the silvery lupine (Lupinus albicaulis), a flowering plant native to the western United States. This plant has been used by indigenous communities for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to its alkaloid and saponin content. The silvery lupine is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding in the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of Lupinus albicaulis var. proximus can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and should be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional or herbalist.
